title: cleidion ramosii
intro: Cleidion ramosii, also known as Ramos' Cleidion, is a species of plant in the family Clusiaceae. It is native to the Philippines and is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cleidion ramosii include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems, making it a valuable remedy for various health conditions. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion, and sometimes combined with other herbs to create herbal remedies.
